title: Dubai Investment Company unit to acquire 80% stake in Clemenceau Medical Center
summary: The acquisition is through a non-cash deal with two existing shareholders
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
The acquisition by Dubai Investments Industries LLC will be through a non-cash deal with two existing shareholders. Image used for illustrative purpose. Image courtesy: Getty Images/ Issarawat Tattong

The acquisition is through a non-cash deal with two existing shareholders

Staff Writer ,  ZAWYA

A fully owned subsidiary of Dubai Investment Company has signed an agreement to acquire 80% stake in Clemenceau Medical Center.
